payload.answer: Ambiguous: Brutto could refer to the London restaurant or the article alias; do not resolve yet.

entity_resolution.reason: The new note lacks enough context to confidently choose between the restaurant and the article alias, so no durable entity linkage should be committed.

payload.intent: rank entity candidates for an ambiguous memory note

memory_cards.statement: A note says Brutto was better than expected, but it is ambiguous which existing Brutto entity it refers to.

details: Did not overwrite existing entity mappings.
Preserved ambiguity instead of committing a durable link.

repair_options: Ask for more context about which Brutto was evaluated.
If future notes mention food, dining, or London, link to the restaurant.
If future notes mention writing, a post, or an alias, link to the article alias.
